title.description: Proposal title (e.g. 'Proposal for SHMS Document Review'). May be drafted from the source engagement description. NOT_FOUND only if the source gives no basis.

proposal_number.description: Proposal/quote reference number, verbatim. NOT_FOUND if absent.

date.description: Proposal date, verbatim. NOT_FOUND if absent.

client_name.description: Prospective client/company name. NOT_FOUND if absent.

client_contact.description: Recipient name and role if given. NOT_FOUND if absent.

prepared_by.description: Person/entity preparing the proposal. NOT_FOUND if absent.

validity.description: How long the proposal/pricing remains valid. COMMERCIALLY-CRITICAL: verbatim only. NOT_FOUND if not stated.

executive_summary.description: Brief summary of the engagement and its value. May be drafted from source material; must not introduce services, outcomes, or figures not in the source. NOT_FOUND if no basis.

background.description: Client situation and why this work is needed. May be drafted from source material only. NOT_FOUND if no basis.

objectives.description: Engagement objectives from the source. Empty array if none.

scope_of_work.description: Work items in scope. COMMERCIALLY-CRITICAL: only work the source actually discusses — never pad the scope.

deliverables.description: Concrete deliverables. COMMERCIALLY-CRITICAL: never promise deliverables the source does not mention.

approach.description: Phases/method of delivery. Descriptions may be lightly drafted from source material. Empty array if none.

duration.description: Duration/dates as stated. NOT_FOUND if not stated.

timeline.description: Milestones and dates. COMMERCIALLY-CRITICAL: dates verbatim only, never invented. Empty array if none.

team.description: People assigned to the engagement. Empty array if none named.

experience.description: Relevant experience/credentials as stated. NOT_FOUND if not stated.

pricing.description: Fee items. COMMERCIALLY-CRITICAL: amounts verbatim only — an invented or misquoted price is the worst failure this doc type can produce. Empty array if the source states no pricing.

amount.description: Amount and unit exactly as stated (e.g. '$180 per document', '$12,500 fixed'). NOT_FOUND if not stated for this item.

notes.description: Qualifiers (ex GST, estimates, volume tiers) verbatim. Empty string if none.

assumptions.description: Assumptions the pricing/scope depends on, from the source. Empty array if none.

exclusions.description: Explicitly out-of-scope items, from the source. Empty array if none.

terms.description: Payment/engagement terms as stated. NOT_FOUND if absent.

quote.description: Short verbatim snippet (max ~30 words) from the source that best evidences this value. Empty string when nothing applies (e.g. NOT_FOUND).
